name: San Antonio Chile Verde
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz.) no salt added tomatoes, chopped
3/4 cup clear chicken broth (ready to serve, with 1/3 less salt)
8 oz canned whole green chilies, rinsed, drained, and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and garlic in hot oil in a large saucepan or Dutch oven until soft.
2. Stir in the next three ingredients: tomatoes, chicken broth, and ground cumin.
3. Arrange chicken, skin side down, in the liquid. Cover and simmer 35 minutes, or until chicken is tender.
4. Remove pan from heat. Remove chicken; cool.
5. Shred chicken, discarding skin and bones. Return chicken to the pan; stir in remaining ingredients: green chilies and Kikkoman Lite Soy Sauce.
6. Heat to serving temperature.
